nodes.label: M5 Max
nodes.role: Primary: LTX 118s, Wan ~10min, Metal kernels. 40 GPU cores, 800GB/s mem bw.

nodes.label: Mac mini M4 Pro
nodes.role: Background tier: Q4 ~40min/clip. 20 GPU cores, 273GB/s mem bw — ~4x slower than M5 Max for these workloads.

phases.title: LTX 13B distilled on M5 MPS
phases.detail: 5.6x faster than Wan baseline. Photoreal output confirmed.

phases.title: Quality-checker harness (measure-render)
phases.detail: Per-frame LPIPS + speedup gate. Novel for Mac video diffusion.

phases.title: Squashed Wan Q4 weights downloaded (mini)
phases.detail: QuantStack Q4_K_M, swaps in for 56GB fp16

phases.title: ComfyUI add-ons (kijai + city96) loaded
phases.detail: UnetLoaderGGUF + EasyCache nodes confirmed live on mini :8189

phases.title: First Wan Q4 render test on mini
phases.detail: Real 5sec/832x480/81 frames. SURPRISE: M2 Pro is the bottleneck, not memory. Mini stays batch/overnight tier.

phases.title: EasyCache speedup test (cooking)
phases.detail: Last in-flight job — will tell us if EasyCache helps mini at all. Cycle bug fixed, retry firing now.

phases.title: First harness comparison: Q4 vs Q4+EasyCache
phases.detail: Real LPIPS numbers, gates each multiplier

phases.title: render-route updated to use working LTX
Custom Metal kernel wiring proven on M5
phases.detail: torch.mps.compile_shader works. Naive RMSNorm+Linear was 60x SLOWER than vendor matmul. Pivot: target flash-attention where vendor doesn't have tuned kernel.

phases.title: Real Metal win: fused flash-attention
phases.detail: PyTorch MPS SDPA is slow; this is the genuine 2-3x lever.

phases.title: Story Forge DSL (.sf script -> .mp4)
phases.detail: 20-line script compiles to ComfyUI workflow + ffmpeg plan. Design done, MVP unwritten.

phases.title: Train 2-step Wan distillation (perpetual 2x)
phases.detail: On top of lightx2v 4-step LoRA. Mini's best use case.

phases.title: ComfyUI LaunchAgent (no more queue hangs)
phases.detail: Plist staged, just need launchctl bootstrap

actively_running: Q4+EasyCache render on mini (~20-25 min left)
right_now.next_decision: After EasyCache result — call tonight done OR keep building DSL / install LaunchAgent / fire another test

final_vision.title: Story Forge — when complete
final_vision.headline: A 20-line .sf script -> a finished 4-min film with narration + music in 10-30 minutes on M5
final_vision.today_baseline: 5 hours per 4-min film, all manual scene config
final_vision.target: M5 = realtime renders (LTX + Wan), mini = batch/distill/training, deterministic + measured

first_in_world: LTX 13B distilled 0.9.8 working on Apple Silicon MPS (photoreal output)
LPIPS-gated speedup harness for Mac video diffusion
Custom Metal kernels for Wan video DiT (wiring proven, flash-attn pending)
rare: Two-node Mac mesh (M5 + mini, with mini confirmed as background tier)

wins: Got LTX 13B distilled 0.9.8 working on M5 MPS — public first per agent research
Built measurement harness — novel for Mac video diffusion
Q4 path validated on mini (slow but real)
Updated render-route to use working LTX
ComfyUI on mini upgraded from v0.3.32 to v0.22.0
Cloned + installed kijai + city96 + Lightricks-LTX repos
dead_ends_killed: diffusers LTXImageToVideoPipeline (5 attempts, can't reproduce multi-scale)
Comfy-Org FP8 Wan models (MPS doesn't support FP8 dtype)
Naive RMSNorm+Linear Metal kernel (60x slower than vendor)
